17.reason: This loop goes out of bounds when j = n-1 because a[j+1] accesses a[n], which is outside the array.

reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-1: 1.0 , reason:  This loop goes out of bounds when j = n-1 because a[j+1] accesses a[n], which is outside the array.
reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-2: 1.0 , reason:  Error: When j = n-1, a[j+1] accesses a[n], which is out of bounds. This causes undefined behavior.
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 1.0 , reason:  [Array index out of bounds: when j = n-1, j+1 = n, which accesses a[n], b[n], etc., beyond the array size of 100 (valid indices 0 to 99). This causes undefined behavior.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 0.5 , reason:  [Array index out of bounds: when j = n-1, j+1 = n which is beyond array size 100 (valid indices 0 to n-1). This causes undefined behavior.]

14.reason: In C, empty initializer {} is not valid for arrays; it must contain at least one initializer (e.g., {0}).

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 0.5 , reason:  Empty initializer list is not allowed in C; use `int count[100]={0};` to avoid compilation error.
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.5 , reason:  Empty initializer list is invalid in standard C; it should be {0} to ensure all elements are initialized to zero.
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 1.0 , reason:  In C, empty initializer {} is not valid for arrays; it must contain at least one initializer (e.g., {0}).

16.reason: [Loop bound should be j<n-1 to prevent accessing a[n] when j=n-1]

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 0.5 , reason:  Loop condition should be `j<n-1` to avoid accessing `a[j+1]` out-of-bounds when j == n-1.
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 1.0 , reason:  [Loop bound should be j<n-1 to prevent accessing a[n] when j=n-1]
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.5 , reason:  Array index out of bounds: when j reaches n-1, accessing a[j+1] exceeds the array bounds. The inner loop condition for bubble sort should be j < n - 1 - i.

53.reason: [Incorrect logic: only checks segments after index i, but continuous chain may start at any segment and include segments before i in the array. Also, sorting above is broken so ordering is unreliable.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 0.5 , reason:  [Incorrect logic: only checks segments after index i, but continuous chain may start at any segment and include segments before i in the array. Also, sorting above is broken so ordering is unreliable.]
